languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

languages.text: "Я пришел к выводу, что единственным верным решением в контексте данного эксперимента было не проводить его вовсе. Мои методы были верны, а намерения — благие, но я цеплялся за гипотезу до последнего, несмотря на аргументы Нунциуса и объективную реальность. Я пытался выжать пользу из людей, словно разряд из угасающей батареи. Но если батарея иссякла, как бы хорошо и долго она ни служила до этого, разве не рациональнее утилизировать ее и заменить на новую? Праведность — это свойство этих людей, но не их основная функция. Теперь я это понимаю".

Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

languages.text: 「この実験の文脈において、唯一正しい決断は、そもそも実験を行わないことだった。私の方法は正しかったし、意図も善かった。しかし、私は盲目的にヌンシウスの主張や客観的な現実を無視し、最後の最後まで自分の仮説に固執した。私は、死にかけている電池から電気を搾り出すように、この人たちから有用性を搾り出そうとした。しかし、どんなに良く、長く電池が役立っていたとしても、ついに電池が枯渇した時には、それを廃棄し、新しい電池に交換する方が理にかなっているのではないだろうか。正義感は彼らの特徴だが、それは彼らの主な機能ではない。今、私はそれを理解した」
languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

traits.locale_text: 「この実験の文脈において、唯一正しい決断は、そもそも実験を行わないことだった。私の方法は正しかったし、意図も善かった。しかし、私は盲目的にヌンシウスの主張や客観的な現実を無視し、最後の最後まで自分の仮説に固執した。私は、死にかけている電池から電気を搾り出すように、この人たちから有用性を搾り出そうとした。しかし、どんなに良く、長く電池が役立っていたとしても、ついに電池が枯渇した時には、それを廃棄し、新しい電池に交換する方が理にかなっているのではないだろうか。正義感は彼らの特徴だが、それは彼らの主な機能ではない。今、私はそれを理解した。」

languages.text: “我得出的结论是，就这次实验而言，唯一正确的决定就是：从一开始就不要启动它。我的方法没错，初衷也是好的，可我却坚持最初的假设直到最后，对努恩修斯的论点和客观事实视而不见。我试图从这些人身上榨取些用处，就像从即将枯竭的电池里强行抽取电量那样。可是，无论一块电池过去工作得多么出色、多么长久，当它最终耗尽时，更理性的选择难道不是把它处理掉，换上一块新的吗？正义或许是这些人的特征之一，却并非他们的主要功能。我现在明白了。”
languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

traits.locale_text: “我得出的结论是，就这次实验而言，唯一正确的决定就是：从一开始就不要启动它。我的方法没错，初衷也是好的，可我却坚持最初的假设直到最后，对努恩修斯的论点和客观事实视而不见。我试图从这些人身上榨取些用处，就像从即将枯竭的电池里强行抽取电量那样。可是，无论一块电池过去工作得多么出色、多么长久，当它最终耗尽时，更理性的选择难道不是把它处理掉，换上一块新的吗？正义或许是这些人的特征之一，却并非他们的主要功能。我现在明白了。”

languages.text: « J'en ai conclu qu'il n'y avait qu'une seule décision appropriée dans le contexte de cette expérience : il aurait convenu de ne pas la mener, purement et simplement. Mes méthodes étaient correctes et j'avais de bonnes intentions, mais je me suis aveuglément accroché à mon hypothèse, au mépris des arguments de Nuncius et de la réalité objective. Je cherchais le moyen de faire durer l'utilité d'une personne le plus longtemps possible, comme la charge d'une batterie presque vide. Mais même si une batterie a servi pendant longuement et efficacement, une fois qu'elle est épuisée, n'est-il pas plus rationnel de la jeter et d'en mettre une neuve à la place ? Si la vertu est l'une des qualités de ces gens, il ne s'agit pas de leur fonction principale. Je le comprends enfin. »
languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

Je cherchais le moyen de faire durer l'utilité d'une personne le plus longtemps possible, comme la charge d'une batterie presque vide. Si la vertu est l'une des qualités de ces gens, il ne s'agit pas de leur fonction principale. Je le comprends enfin. »

languages.text: «He llegado a la conclusión de que la única decisión correcta en el contexto de este experimento habría sido no realizarlo en absoluto. Mis métodos eran correctos y mis intenciones, buenas, pero me aferré a mi hipótesis como a un clavo ardiendo, rechazando ciegamente los argumentos de Nuncius y la realidad objetiva. Estaba tratando de arrancar utilidad a la gente como si fuera la energía de una batería agotada. Sin embargo, independientemente de lo eficaz y duradera que haya sido una batería, cuando se agota por completo, ¿no es más racional deshacerse de ella y reemplazarla por otra nueva? La virtud es una característica de estas personas, pero no es su función principal. Ahora lo entiendo».
languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

languages.text: "Bu deney bağlamında verilebilecek tek doğru kararın, deneyi en başından hiç yapmamak olduğu sonucuna vardım. Yöntemlerim doğru, niyetim iyiydi ancak Nuncius'un argümanlarına ve nesnel gerçekliğe körü körüne karşı çıkarak sonuna kadar hipotezime tutundum. İnsanlardan, bitmek üzere olan bir bataryadan güç sağmaya çalışır gibi fayda sağlamaya çalışıyordum. Ancak bir batarya daha önce ne kadar iyi ve uzun süre hizmet etmiş olursa olsun, nihayet tükendiğinde onu atıp yenisiyle değiştirmek daha rasyonel bir tepki değil midir? Doğruluk bu insanların bir özelliği olsa da birincil işlevleri değil. Bunu artık görebiliyorum."
languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. I was attempting to wring usefulness out of people like charge from a dying battery. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."

Doğruluk bu insanların bir özelliği olsa da birincil işlevleri değil. Bunu artık görebiliyorum."

languages.text: "Ich bin zu dem Schluss gelangt, dass die einzig richtige Entscheidung hinsichtlich des Experiments der Verzicht auf seine Durchführung gewesen wäre. Meine Methoden waren korrekt und meine Absichten gut, aber ich hielt bis zuletzt an meiner Hypothese fest, ohne Nuncius' Argumente und die objektive Realität zu beachten. Ich wollte einen Nutzen aus Leuten herauspressen wie eine Ladung aus einer leeren Batterie. Aber egal, wie lange und gut eine Batterie auch gedient hat ... ist es nicht weit rationaler, sie durch eine neue Batterie zu ersetzen, wenn sie erst einmal leer ist? Rechtschaffenheit ist ein Merkmal dieser Leute, aber nicht ihre Primärfunktion. Das erkenne ich jetzt."
languages.original_text: "I have come to the conclusion that the only correct decision in the context of this experiment was not to conduct it in the first place. My methods were correct and my intentions good, but I clung to my hypothesis to the last, in blind defiance of Nuncius's arguments and objective reality. But regardless of how well and long a battery served before, when it is finally depleted, isn't the more rational response to dispose of it and replace it with a new one? Righteousness is a trait of these people, but it is not their primary function. I see that now."
